title: orcuttia californica
intro:
Orcuttia californica, also known as the desert-grass or Orcutt grass, is a rare perennial wildflower native to the coastal sage scrub and chaparral habitats of California, particularly in the coastal mountain ranges.

This plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Orcuttia californica include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as colds and coughs. Traditional herbal preparations of Orcuttia californica include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
